summary: Video set to music with Trump's voice reciting job and construction numbers over color-graded footage: Trump backlit at a podium, a man and a child in orange hard hats sitting atop a solar-panel installation above a forest, and Trump at the State of the Union with VP Vance and Speaker Mike Johnson seated behind him. It ends on a 'DEPARTMENT OF LABOR / UNITED STATES OF AMERICA' seal over a slow-motion waving American flag. Spoken lines include 'factories, plants, and laboratories are being built', '70,000 new construction jobs', and '100% of all jobs created under my administration have been in the private sector.'

script.scene: Low-key shot of Trump from behind at a podium in a dark warehouse-like venue, rim-lit; audio of Trump: 'thousands of new businesses are forming... factories, plants, and laboratories are being built.'
Golden-hour footage of a man in an orange hard hat and a child in an orange hard hat sitting atop a solar-panel installation above a forest; audio: '70,000 new construction jobs.'

Trump speaking at the State of the Union rostrum, VP Vance and Speaker Mike Johnson seated behind him against draped American flags; audio: 'more Americans are working today than at any time in our history.'
Continued State of the Union shot, Johnson applauding; Trump: '100% of all jobs created under my administration have been in the private sector.'
Closing card: white 'DEPARTMENT OF LABOR / UNITED STATES OF AMERICA' seal over a slow-motion waving American flag in muted tones.

notable_text: Tweet: '.@POTUS is putting American Workers First and taking our economy to new heights. The Golden Age is upon us.' On-screen: Department of Labor seal. Spoken: '100% of all jobs created under my administration have been in the private sector.'
